---
title: "Features"
sidebar: en
---

Établi Doc surfaces the everyday-useful parts of Paperless-ngx on the phone — without trying to be a full web-UI replica.

## Modules

| Area | What it does |
|------|--------------|
| **Document list** | Chronological list; infinite scroll, pull-to-refresh. |
| **Full-text search** | Queries against the Paperless index, including OCR content. |
| **Filters** | By correspondent, document type and tags. |
| **Detail view** | Preview of the stored file (PDF/image), metadata, assigned tags / correspondent / type. |
| **Tag / type editing** | Apply existing values to a document. |

## Workflows

| Goal | In the app |
|------|------------|
| Find an old invoice | Open list → search field → keyword → open hit → view PDF. |
| Browse documents from a correspondent | Filters → pick the correspondent → list narrows down. |
| Adjust labels | Detail view → tags section → set / remove tag. |

## Network profile

| Connection | Target |
|------------|--------|
| HTTPS requests | only to the configured server URL. |
| Auth | API token in the `Authorization` header. |
| Other hosts | not contacted. |

## Where to get it

| Channel | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Android (APK) | **Development build** via [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-doc/releases) |
| App Store (iOS) · Google Play (Android) | planned — not yet available |
| F-Droid — main repository | planned — not yet available |
| Source code | [`etabli-dev/etabli-doc`](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-doc) |
